abstract_ts: Desde os fináis do século XIX desenvolveu-se no centro interior do País (em área montanhosa caracterizada por fraca densidade populacional, com os respectivos aglomerados distanciados uns dos outros, embora de povoamento concentrado) uma forte corrente migratoria em direcção a Lisboa. Essa corrente demográfica acarretou consequências positivas para a sobrevivência e para um certo desenvolvimento de grande parte das povoações, através de um peculiar e poderoso mecanismo associativo. A aldeia distante tornou-se ponto de referência emocional, ganhando uma representação imaginária que a identifica e caracteriza. Imaginaram-se emblemas e divisas que constituem a base de uma heráldica popular; «nobilitaram-se» as personalidades dos naturais que se ilustram em plano local ou nacional; criaram-se encómios diferenciados que sobrelevam cada lugar em relaçào a todos os outros numa afirmação competitiva de identidades e de pertenças específicas. Em símese, reuniram-se condições afectivas e materiais, para que aos olhos dos residentes e dos emigrados cada uma das terras de origem se torne uma pequena mas inconfundível pátria. Cúpula de todas as ideias agregadoras unificadoras, aplicável aos movimentos de menor dimensão e expressão, como às redes federativas do associativismo — a nível concelhio ou distrital —, o regionalismo é um ideal omnipresente, com grande potencial operativo, que conduz à construção da unidade e ao reforço da solidariedade individual e colectiva, entre o conjunto de micropátrias distintas constituido pelas gentes da Serra. Un fort courant migratoire dirigé vers Lisbonne s'est développé dans le centre intérieur du Portugal (région montagneuse caractérisée par une faible densité de population, aux villages éloignés les uns des autres, et par un peuplement concentré) depuis la fin du 19.e siècle. Ce courant démographique entraîna des conséquences positives pour la survivance et pour un certains développement de la plupart des villages, à travers un puissant méchanisme associatif aux caractéristiques très particulières. Le village lointain est devenu un point de repère émotionnel, tout en acquérant une représentation imaginaire qui l'identifie et le caractérise. On a imaginé des emblèmes et des devises qui constituent la base d'une héraldique populaire; on a «ennobli» les naturels qui se sont distingués sur le plan national ou local; on a adopté des louanges differenciées, chaque lieu essayant de s'exceller è l'affirmation de son identité et de ses prérogatives. En bref, les conditions affectives et matérielles sont réunies pour que chacun des lieux d'origine devienne, aux yeux des résidents et des émigrés, une micro-patrie qui ne peut être confondue avec aucune autre. En tant que point de convergence de toutes les idées d'agrégation et d'unification propre aux mouvements de moindre expression et de moindre dimension — par exemple, les réseaux fédératifs de l'associativisme au niveau municipal ou cantonal —, le régionalisme est un idéal omniprésent, au grand potentiel opératif, qui conduit à la construction de l'unité et au renforcement de la solidarité individuelle et collective dans cet ensemble de micropatries constitué par les «gentes da Serra». A strong migratory flow from central inland Portugal (a mountainous country with weak population density, sparse settlements and concentrated population) has developed towards Lisbon since the end of the 19th century. This demographic movement had a positive influence for the survival and some progress of most of the villages, by means of a specific, powerful associative mechanism. Villages have become emotional reference marks, with identifying imaginary representations of themselves. Emblems and distinctive marks have been imagined and have become the basis of the existing popular heraldry; those natives who have distinguished themselves either at the local or the national level have been raised to «nobility»; each village competes for affirming its own identity and specific belongings, by creating differentiated encomia. Briefly, affective and material conditions have been brought together, so that every native village might become a small but unconfounded fatherland for both residents and emigrants. Regionalism is an omnipresent ideal, as long as it represents the cupola of aggregating, unifying ideas that fits minor social movements (e. g. the federative networks of associativism in municipio and districts). Its great operative potencial leads to unity and strengthening of mutual assistance of individuals and communities within this set of microfatherlands.

abstract_ts: Why do advocacy organizations focus on some issues rather than others? Issue selection is an important area of study given that advocacy organizations have limited time and resources and thus many potentially important issues go ignored. Yet issue selection remains an understudied question in the scholarly study of advocacy organizations. In this article, the author draws on historical data, interviews, and a database of statements by major human rights advocacy organizations to examine one particular historical puzzle regarding issue selection: Why advocacy organizations have focused on the recent conflict in the Darfur region of Sudan rather than the conflict in the Democratic Republic of Congo, even though more people have died in the Congo. The author finds that advocacy organizations select issues not based on their severity but based on framing, political opportunities, and organizational resources.

abstract_ts: The Act to Provide for a Copper Coinage of May 8, 1792 made non-Federal coppers no longer current. Certain preconditions specified in the Act had to occur before the Act became effective. Numismatic opinion has held that the Treasury Department never published a proclamation required for the Act to be effective. In fact, the Treasury did publish notice as required by the Act. By the terms of the Act and the implementing notice, non-Federal coppers could no longer be tendered or received in payment after February 16,1804.

abstract_ts: Two genomic clones corresponding to putative pectate lyase genes (plA and plB) were isolated and characterized in strawberry (Fragaria×ananassa cv. Chandler). The corresponding ORFs for the plA and plB genes revealed deduced proteins of 451 and 439 amino acids, respectively, that differ from that of the previously isolated strawberry plC gene. Southern blot analysis has shown that while the plB gene is a single copy gene, the plA gene is probably encoded by a small multigene family. By using specific probes corresponding to the untranslated 3′ terminal region of the pl genes, and QRT-PCR methodology, the spatio-temporal expression pattern of both strawberry pl genes have been compared with that of the plC gene. The three transcripts were specifically expressed only in fruit and mainly during the ripening stages. Moreover, the expression of the plA and plB genes was induced in green de-achened fruit, but this increase was reduced by the external application of auxins as was the expression of plC. The expression of both pl genes was also strongly reduced in harvested fruit kept in controlled atmosphere (CA) containing high CO2 levels. Immunolocalized studies using antibodies raised against the strawberry PL proteins placed the proteins in the cell wall of parenchymatic cells of the fruit receptacle. The role of pl genes in cell-wall disassembly and fruit ripening softening is discussed.

abstract_ts: Rising costs of health care provision throughout the world have provoked a vigorous debate about the design of health care systems and the role of government in health care. In countries that have predominantly social provision, there are moves towards privatization and direct attempts to regulate prices. In more market-oriented systems, rising costs seem to be resulting in a greater uninsured problem and this too is provoking demands for reform. Technological change will put constant pressure on health care systems (public or private), generating serious social choice problems. However, this must be seen in the context of a traditional commitment to providing a non-trivial minimum level of health care to all members of society. We discuss evidence from OECD countries from 1960 to 1990, then focus on more recent changes. The central problems of market-oriented systems are cost containment and the fact that significant segments of the population go uninsured. Most OECD countries have therefore chosen solutions where health care financing is socialized. We present a simple political economy model to describe the conditions under which this will arise. The hallmark of public provision is relative uniformity in access to health care. This creates incentives for individuals to opt out of the public sector and to supplement what they can obtain through the state. In addition, it creates a significant commitment to redistribution through public provision. Rising costs strain the generosity of taxpayers. We expect to see increased reliance on market solutions and moves towards multi-tiered health systems that differentiate health care provisions made for different groups in society.

abstract_ts: Surface areas and volumes of compartments within rapidly secreting and slowly secreting Limonium perezii salt glands were determined to be similar. Molecular and volume effluxes of secreted salt solutions were calculated by the application of secretion rates to plasmalemma surface areas. If ion efflux from the glands was a transmembrane phenomenon, fluxes of 1.04 × 10-5 equivalents m-2 s-1 would have been necessary to match secretion rates. These fluxes were a thousand times higher than fluxes estimated for most plant cells. Correlated with these high membrane fluxes was the fact that mitochondria occupied 10% of the protoplast volume. Thirty-two percent of the plasmalemma available for efflux was associated with wall protuberances. Wall protuberances amplified the plasmalemma surface area by a factor of 1.6.

abstract_ts: Major structural changes in government since national security became a dominant priority threaten to undermine regulatory protections of the nation's environment. One troubling environmental threat is the introduction of invasive species, especially those introduced by ballast water discharged from ships arriving in U.S. ports. In 2003, the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) denied a petition—four years after receiving it—that sought to repeal an EPA rule exempting ballast water from regulation under the Clean Water Act (CWA). Despite having authority to regulate ballast water under the CWA, the EPA decided that the Coast Guard should regulate ballast water. Yet the Coast Guard is no longer able to tackle the problem due to its focus on national security in the wake of the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001. As the ballast water issue suggests, courts should not defer to an agency decision about its role relative to other agencies. Instead, courts should consider the legislative concept underlying the agency's authorizing statute and determine whether the agency's rationale is reasonable. Without this review by the judiciary, an agency might simply defer unpleasant or undesired regulatory tasks to a sister agency with no real power, leading to under-regulation.

abstract_ts: Organ fibrosis has been viewed as a major medical problem that leads to progressive dysfunction of the organ and eventually the death of patients. Stress-related hormone norepinephrine (NE) has been reported to exert fibrogenic actions in the injured organ. Nix plays a critical role in pressure overload-induced cardiac remodeling and heart failure through mediating cardiomyocyte apoptosis. However, cardiac remodeling also includes fibrosis. Whether Nix is involved in stress-induced fibrosis remains unclear. The present study was designed to determine the role of Nix in NE-induced NIH/3T3 fibroblasts. The results showed that Nix was upregulated and closely associated with cell proliferation, collagen and fibronectin expression in NIH/3T3 fibroblasts following NE treatment. Overexpression of Nix promoted collagen and fibronectin expression, whereas the suppression of Nix resulted in a strong reduction in collagen and fibronectin expression. Moreover, the increases in collagen and fibronectin expression induced by NE were successively increased when Nix was overexpressed and reduced when Nix was inhibited. Furthermore, we demonstrated that the PKC activation is responsible for the upregulation of Nix induced by NE. Inhibition of Nix expression with α-adrenoceptor antagonist, β-adrenoceptor antagonist or PKC inhibitor attenuated NE-induced collagen and fibronectin expression. Our data revealed that Nix is a novel mediator of NE-induced fibrosis. Thus, it would provide a new insight into the development of effective preventative measures and therapies of tissue fibrosis.

abstract_ts: Transboundary protected areas (PAs) currently represent nearly 10% of the world's network of PAs. The protection of their biological wealth poses special challenges because of the need for cooperation among sovereign states. Adaptive management strategies offer hope for a more accurate assessment of ecological conditions within PAs, and have the potential for furthering one of the major objectives of these PAs, namely enhancing environmental cooperation between countries across whose boundaries the protected area complex is situated. This paper examines the implications of adaptive management for transboundary PAs by using the Polish/Belarusian Bialowieza PAs as a case study. Managers of PAs have conventionally aimed at accurate predictions and short-term system equilibrium through 'top-down' policies of control and exclusion. In the case of PAs, these objectives have meant limiting use and employing models of linear growth. Adaptive management strategies rely instead on long-term experience, assessment of experimental interventions, and collection of greater amounts of information to assess future outcomes. They aim at the satisfaction of objectives that may include equilibrium changes. These features of adaptive management imply attention over time to the interactions between different key species, greater involvement of local populations in the collection of information about the resources, and experimenting with different levels of use to infer the most suitable protection strategies.

abstract_ts: Detailed studies are essential in India to evaluate air quality and implement measures for effective control of mining in sensitive locations. A study for this purpose was carried out in the Basundhara area of the Ib Valley coalfield in Orissa State, India. The 24-hr average concentrations of suspended particulate matter (SPM), respirable particulate matter (RPM), sulphur dioxide (SO₂) and oxides of nitrogen (NOx) were determined at regular intervals throughout one year at seven monitoring stations in residential areas and two stations in mining/industrial areas. The 24-hr average SPM and RPM concentrations were 312.7-598.4 µgm⁻³ and 100.2–199.6 µgm⁻³ in industrial areas, and were 95.6-275.7 µgm⁻³ and 28.5-86.8 µgm⁻³ in residential areas. During the study period, 24-hr and annual average SPM and RPM concentrations exceeded the respective standards set in the Indian national ambient air quality standard (NAAQS) protocol in certain residential and industrial areas. However, 24-hr and annual average concentrations of SO₂ (residential: 20.5–24.3 µgm , industrial: 15.3— 30.8 µgm⁻³) and NOx (residential: 19.7–25.3 µgm⁻³, industrial: 14.3–33.5 µgm⁻³) were well within the prescribed limit of the NAAQS in both residential and industrial areas. The temporal variations of SPM and RPM fitted polynomial trends well and on average in the mining area 31.38% of the SPM was RPM. The linear regression correlation coefficients between SPM and RPM and between NOx and SO₂ were 0.90 and 0.52, respectively. The kriging technique determined that maximal concentrations of SPM and RPM occurred within the mining site. A management strategy is formulated for effective control of air pollution at source, and mitigative measures should include implementation of green belts around the sensitive areas where the concentration of air pollutants exceeds the standard limit.

abstract_ts: Over 80 years ago, Borinsƚaw Manilowski documented the verbal magic of Trobiand gardeners as they tended their crops. More than 40 years later, J. L. Austin argued that words are not simply descriptive but are equally engaged in the productions of actions, indeed are actions themselves. Not long afterward, this idea was given a name: speech acts. This article expands that concept to include what may be termed image acts and argues that a theory of action should include a theory of images.

abstract_ts: The legislative elections that were held in France on March 5th and 12th, 1967, after fourteen months of a campaign that followed closely the presidential election, have probably astonisted the observers less than the previous ones. And this, in spite of the polls that remained the major subject of debate. The fact is that the recession of Gollism was not a reversal of majority. It just increased the classical controversy existing in France about the electoral system. On the other hand, a lot of people has been able to foresee an increase of this majority in the moment of truth of the motion of censure. Nonetheless, beyond the motives of the electors and the shifts in party vote that show certain surprising facts, this last election has brought a new analysis of the components of the majority as well as of the trends towards bipolarisation. These two main problems find, in this election and in its consequences, some contradictory evidence; while in the background everybody is manoeuvring for the post-gollist era, without ignoring the one mainly concerned with it.

abstract_ts: The Arab-Israeli conflict has been a testing ground for the involvement of U.S. courts in foreign conflicts and for the concept of civil litigation against terrorists. Plaintiffs on both sides of the dispute have sought to recover damages in U.S. courts, embroiling the courts in one of the world's most contentious political disputes. Plaintiffs bringing claims against the Palestine Liberation Organization, the Palestinian Authority, material supporters of terrorism, and the Islamic Republic of Iran have been aided by congressional statutes passed precisely to enhance their ability to bring such lawsuits, whereas plaintiffs bringing suit against Israel or Israeli leaders have not had the benefit of such laws. Although the courts have sought to give effect to the congressional authorization embodied in these statutes, they have faced the resistance—at times half-hearted—of the executive branch, which regards such legislative and judicial involvement as an intrusion on its foreign policy prerogatives. Though these lawsuits have been subject to criticism and have not fully achieved the goals attributed to them, U.S. courts have largely acted within the authority given them by Congress and the executive branch in hearing the suits, and there is at least some evidence that such lawsuits constitute an effective tool in the fight against terrorism.

abstract_ts: Plantlets were produced by induction of nucellar embryony (apomixis) in isolated unfertilized ovules of a non-apomictic plant—the grapevine (Vitis vinifera L. cv. Cabernet-Sauvignon). Ovules grown in liquid culture with benzyladenine (5—10 μM) and β-naphthoxyacetic acid (5—25 μM) formed a nucellar callus which gave rise to somatic embryos. For growth of plantlets the embryos were transferred to an agar medium containing gibberellic acid (1 μM) and 2-isopentenyladenine (5 μM). This is the first report of somatic embryo formation in a cultivar of a temperate fruit.

abstract_ts: When we see something in a picture, do we enjoy visual experience as of the depicted object? Gombrichians say yes: when viewing ordinary pictures we simultaneously see the picture and seem to see its object. But why, then, isn’t seeing-in contradictory, and how are these two elements somehow integrated into a single experience? Gombrichians’ attempts to answer appeal either to our awareness of the picture’s design, or to the idea that picture and object are not given as in the same place. I argue that neither answer is successful, and thus that Gombrichianism is false.

abstract_ts: Abidjan for long has been considered to be one of the most productive and progressive fashion centres on the African continent. One was wondering what would be the reactions in terms of output, style development, and meaning in times of political and economic crisis that the country is enduring since 2002. Furthermore, the processes of globalization have introduced significant changes with the tremendous quantities of textile imports from Asia and the intensified mediation of prestigious images of world fashion, Western lifestyles, and role models of femininity. Surprisingly, Abidjan still turns out to be a thriving city with a highly dynamic fashion sector whose trends and styles have won highest esteem in countries all over West and Central Africa. This study has two aims: On the one hand, it looks into the organization of production and circulation of fashion to get a better understanding of the local technical and material constraints and opportunities which prevail in this specific city. On the other hand, the focus is on the strategies of professional designers and urban women to cope with the influences of globalization, i.e., the promises of and the limited access to the world market, the political and economic power of the West. Designers as well as women strive with local means to be part of the global world and to retain valuable local cultural values which are constantly redefined. Fashion and the invention of styles play a crucial role in articulating and assuming social changes.

abstract_ts: Utilizzando soprattutto i diari che Loria tenne con regolarità nel corso delle sue esplorazioni, il saggio ripercorre alcuni momenti del suo lungo soggiorno in Nuova Guinea britannica. In particolare si affrontano gli aspetti narrativi delle pagine (finora inedite) dell’etnologo italiano e si delineano i toni e lo stile del suo raccontare, i modi della sua osservazione dei popoli – selvaggi e civili – e gli incontri e gli eventi significativi dei quali egli fornisce testimonianza diretta con partecipazione, empatia e un inedito sguardo antropologico. I suoi diari vengono paragonati a quelli di Malinowski il quale – venti anni dopo – avrebbe percorso gli stessi territori, tentando un confronto tra le forme espressive e la personalità dei due autori. Dal paragone tra i loro diari emerge anche il radicale mutamento delle atmosfere culturali e dei quadri teorici della ricerca etnoantropologica, che scaturisce proprio dall’esperienza di Malinowski.

abstract_ts: Historians of cartography, science and geography have sought to examine mpa making as a form of geographical knowledge in the Enlightenment. Attention has been paid to the nature of mapping at that time and to the social hierarchies of those persons involved in the production of maps. The focus in this paper is on the basis of map making in Enlightenment Scotland as matters of social networks rather than of hierarchies alone and on the epistemological questions of trust and authority in the mapmaker as well as in the map. / Les historiens de la cartographie, des sciences et de la géographie se sont efforcés d'analyser la production cartographique à l'époque des Lumières comme une forme du savoir géographique. Ils ont porté leur attention sur les caractéristiques de cette cartographie et sur le rang social des personnes impliquées dans la production des cartes. Dans cet article, nous insistons sur les caractères généraux de la production cartographique dans l'Écosse des Lumières, qui relève de réseaux sociaux, et non des seules hiérarchies sociales et, d'autre part, sur les questions épistémologiques que posent la confiance et l'autorité accordées au cartographe comme à sa carte. / Historiker, die sich mit Kartographie, Wissenschaftsgeschichte und Geographie beschäftigen, haben versucht, den Prozess der Kartenherstellung in der Aufklärung als Ausdrucksform geographischen Wissens zu untersuchen. Dabei wurde besonderes Augenmerk auf die Art und Weise der Durchführung der Kartierung und auf die sozialen Hierarchien der an der Kartenherstellung beteiligten Personen in dieser Zeit gelegt. Dieser Beitrag stellt die Grundzüge der Kartenherstellung in Schottland zur Zeit der Aufklärung als Ergebnis sozialer Netzwerke statt ausschließlich von Hierarchien dar. Fragen des Vertrauens in den Kartographen und nach seiner Autorität, eine zuverlässige Karte herstellen zu können, spielten eine wesentliche Rolle. / Los historiadores de la cartografía, de la historia de la ciencia y de la geografía han analizado la producción cartográfica en la Ilustración como una forma del saber geográfico basándose en las características de esta cartografía y en la posición social de las personas que la realizaban. En este artículo estudiamos las características generales de la producción de mapas en Escocia durante la Ilustración, que ponen de manifiesto las relaciones sociales y jerárquicas además de las cuestiones epistemológicas que influyen en la confianza y la autoridad concedidas tanto al cartógrafo como a sus mapas.

abstract_ts: Root tips of the wilty pepper mutant scarbrous diminutive accumulate less rubidium than those of the normal genotype. This phenomenon was evident in root tips excised from plants maintained for 2 d in CaSO4 solution (low salt plants), especially in the lower external concentration range 0.1—1.0 mM) of RbCl. The efflux rate of Rb+ from mutant root tips was twice as high as in normal root tips. These results indicate that the ability of the mutant roots to absorb and accumulate Rb+ and K+ is impaired. This defect could be a consequence of either an impaired Na+/K+ carrier system, or increased leakiness of mutant membranes, or both. The fact that the normal roots can accumulate Rb+ much faster than mutant roots supports the first alternative, i.e. that the high affinity carrier system was impaired in the mutant roots. However, the higher efflux rate of Rb+ from the mutant roots suggests that membrane leakiness was also affected.

abstract_ts: We obtain a sharp lower bound for the volumes of purely 1 -dimensional complex analytic subvarieties in a geodesic tubular neighborhood of the diagonal of the Cartesian product of a compact Riemann surface with itself. This leads to a lower bound of the Seshadri number of the canonical line bundle of the Cartesian product with respect to the diagonal. As a consequence, we obtain an upper bound for the hyperbolic injectivity radii of compact Riemann surfaces of a fixed gonality. In particular, we obtain the limiting behavior of the gonalities of a tower of compact Riemann surfaces.We also give an application of our results to an invariant related to the ample cone of the symmetric product of a Riemann surface.

abstract_ts: Xylem within trees varies in its hydraulic efficiency and safety. Trees at the alpine timberline were expected to exhibit a hydraulic architecture protecting the leader shoot from winter embolism. Hydraulic and related anatomical parameters were compared as well as seasonal courses of winter embolism in leader shoots and twigs of Norway spruce trees growing at 2000 m. Leader shoots had a 1.4-fold higher specific hydraulic conductivity (ks) as well as a 4.9-fold higher leaf specific conductivity (kl) than side twigs. Vulnerability to drought-induced embolism was lower in leader shoots with a 50% loss of conductivity occurring at a water potential (Psi 50) 0.7 MPa lower than in twigs. Higher ks and kl were related to 1.2-fold wider tracheid diameters in leader shoots. Lower vulnerability corresponded to smaller pit dimensions but not to wood density. High ks and kl reflect the hydraulic dominance of the leader shoot, which is important for its water supply during summer. Low vulnerability protects the leader shoot from embolism during the winter season. In field measurements at the timberline during the winter of 2001/2002, conductivity losses of up to 56% were observed only in twigs while leader shoots showed little or no embolism. Results demonstrate that leader shoot xylem is both hydraulically efficient and safe.

abstract_ts: The paper presents data from a Tunisian village that was visited twice for statistical purpose and for interviews. The aim was to examine the influences of television on social structures. This paper discusses the possibility that television, as it consumes time and has its effects in small rooms only, focuses attention on the family, thus weakening the importance of reciprocity, so typical of traditional village life. Moreover, it seems that reciprocity does not work so well with television, as invitations to watch television cannot be reciprocated, if the invited family does not possess a television set. Furthermore, a return invitation to watch television is difficult because television is typically limited to small rooms only. Thus, the obligation to share is replaced by structures of possession and property, at least in the context of television.

abstract_ts: Recalling the fundamental stages of the biographical and intellectual vicissitudes of Giovanni Amendola's life, the a. points out how the juvenile period of « cultural » training, particularly between 1904 and 1912 (with the decisive experience of the contribution to the periodical « La Voce » ) is the premise to understand the characteristics of the proper « political » conception of Giovanni Amendola who from the matrix of a strict liberalism, loyal to the ideals of the Risorgimento and to Silvio Spaventa's principles, attains, chiefly after 1922, to the programme of « Nuova Democrazia ». Through a constant reference to the ethical and political values, the a. reconstructs the fundamental features of Amendola's proposals tending to realise (against the liberticidal impositions of Fascism which from a movement had changed into a regime) a reform of the State. To put a stop to the excesses of the executive power, to curb the excessive recourse to the decreti-legge, to defeat the evil of administrative centralisation, to guarantee local self-government, to restore the guaranty of independence to the magistracy: here are the key-points of Amendola's political thought aiming at making operative a state organisation where the masses are no more compelled, as the Fascist leaders demanded, to submit to « the solid call of the cudgel », but may express themselves concretely through the free debate and participate in the exercise of power, past the absurd preclusions of the one and only political party or the equally inadmissible ideological ostracisms: those very same ostracisms which will cost Amendola the sacrifice of his life, just in defence of man supremacy and the future advent of the « new democracy » of which democratic Italy, emerged from the war of liberation in 1945, should take up the inheritance.

abstract_ts: The authors propose a conceptual model of the use of nutrition labels and on-package claims. Knowledge, perceived diet effectiveness, health status, and skepticism toward claims are all hypothesized to be significant in explaining the use of package claims and nutrition labels. Results from a preliminary investigation of the relationships among these constructs show that a person's perception of how effective diet is in the fight against disease is related positively to the use of nutrition panel information and package claims. In addition, diet—disease knowledge is related positively to the use of package nutrition information in the forms of both package claims and panel information. Finally, being at risk for a diet-related disease is related positively to knowledge about the dietary links to the disease. The authors discuss policy implications of these findings.

abstract_ts: In der vorgelegten Arbeit wird der Blühverlauf bei 122 Sorten Pelargonium zonale Ait. beschrieben und charakterisiert. Die Frühzeitigkeit des Aufblühens wurde in der Zeit vom 18. 4. bis 8. 6. 1962 geprüft. Sie wurde bei den einzelnen Sorten in Tagen, die vom letzten Ausbrechen der Blütenknospen (20. 3.) bis zum Aufblühen des ersten Blütenstandes (drei völlig aufgeblühte Blüten) vergangen sind, ausgedrückt. Es wurden einfachblühende mit halbgefüllt-und gefülltblühenden Sorten verglichen. Alle empfehlenswerten Züchtungen des Standardsortiment es in der ČSSR wiesen mehr als 50% aufgeblühte Pflanzen auf. Die einzelnen Sorten wurden außerdem charakterisiert nach früher und reicher Blüte. Es ist bemerkenswert, daß hierbei einzelne ältere Sorten noch bedeutungsvoll sind. Verschiedene Sorten sollten durch gute Erhaltungszüchtung und strenge Auswahl der Mutterpflanzen zu besserer Leistung gebracht werden. Zwischen der durchschnittlichen Doldenzahl je Pflanze und dem Werte des diesbezüglichen Variationskoeffizienten wurde eine negative, sehr gesicherte Korrelation errechnet. Diese Beziehung gilt für beide geprüften Sortengruppen (einfach-und gefüllt-sowie halbgefülltblühende). Frau O. Petrová und Fräulein A. Bezousková danke ich für ihre verläßliche technische Hilfe. В предлагаемой работе дается характеристика и описывается цветение 122 сортов Ранний срок расцветания проверялся с 18/ІУ по 8/У1-1962 г. Для отдельных сортов этот срок выражается в днях от появления последней цветочной почки (20/1II) до распускания первого зонтика (три, полностью раскрывшиеся, бутона). Сравнивались сорта с простыми, полу- махровыми и махровыми цветами. Все рекомендуемые сорта стандартного сортимента ЧССР имеют более 50% зацветших экземпляров. Для отдельных сортов дается кроме того характеристика с точки зрения раннего и богатого цветения. Интересно, что среди них есть более старые сорта, которые имеют еще большое значение. У различных сортов следует путем разведения на сохранение сорта и более строгого отбора материнских растений добиться лучших показателей. Между средним числом зонтиков на одно растение и показателем коэффицентов вариации была установлена высоко достоверная отрицательная корреляция. Это соотношение действительно для обеих проверявшихся групп сортов (простые, махровые и полумахровые цветы). In the present paper the flowering period of 122 varieties of Pelargonium zonale Ait. is described and characterized. The early appearance of flowers was examined from April 18th until June 8th, 1962, and for the individual varieties it was expressed in days that had elapsed from the latest formation of flower buds until the opening of the first inflorescence (three fully opened flowers). Singleflowered varieties were compared with partly double-flowered and double-flowered ones. All recommendable varieties of the standard assortment in the Czechoslovak Socialist Republic had more than 50 per cent blossomed plants. The individual varieties were also characterized according to the early and profuse appearance of flowers. It is worth notice that some of the older varieties are still important in this respect. The efficiency of a number of varieties should be increased by keeping them true to type and by a strict selection of the parent plants. A negative, very secured correlation was found between the average number of umbels per plant and the value of the respective coefficient of variation. This relationship holds for the two groups of varieties examined (single, partly double-flowered and double-flowered).

abstract_ts: Sequences of ancient end moraines are evidence that successively smaller ice sheets centred on the Patagonian Andes developed during successive Quaternary glaciations. At Torres del Paine (51°S, 73°W) the volume and variety of landforms which mark the extent of phases of the last ice sheet are remarkably small, in contrast with far larger moraines deposited by older, more extensive ice sheets. This implies that the sediment budget of the last ice sheet was low. Potential debris sources are considered, and it is concluded that supraglacial sources were few, and that reworking of older drift was limited because much of the last ice sheet advanced over drift free terrain, the deposits of earlier ice sheets being confined to areas beyond the extent of the last ice sheet. As in other mid-latitude areas, glacial erosion in the Torres del Paine area appears to have decreased with successive glaciations. The size of a moraine may be unrelated to the glaciological/climatic significance of a particular glacial fluctuation.

abstract_ts: Im Mittel dreijähriger Versuche zur Gewächshaustomate 'Sonato' mit Blühbeginn Mitte Februar, Anfang März und Mitte März war bis zum Ernteabschluß des zehnten Blütenstandes mit Gesamterträgen bis zu 12 kg/m² eine Anbaudauer von 140,7 Tagen erforderlich. Die Blühperiode dauert insgesamt 85,7 Tage und im Mittel je Blütenstand 36,6 Tage. Zwischen dem Blühbeginn zweier benachbarter Blütenstände vergingen im Mittel 6,9 Tage. Die Ernte begann im Mittel des Blütenstandes 25,2 Tage nach dem Blühende und war nach 25,1 Tagen beendet; das sind je Blütenstand zwischen Blühbeginn und Ernteabschluß im Mittel 86,9 Tage. Zwischen dem Erntebeginn des ersten und dem Ernteabschluß des zehnten Blütenstandes vergingen 73,7 Tage. Die Pflanzen waren bis zur Ansatzstelle des zehnten Blütenstandes im Mittel 2,75 m lang. Zwischen dem ersten und zehnten Blütenstand betrug der Abstand zweier benachbarter Blütenstände im Mittel 26,4 cm. В трехлетних опытах с тепличным томатом сорта Зонато было установлено, что при различных сроках начала цветения (в середине февраля, в начале и середине марта) до окончания уборки плодов десятого соцветия и при валовом урожае 12 кг/м2 требуется средний период выращивания в 140,7 дня. Период цветения продолжался в целом 85,7 дня и в среднем на каждое соцветие — 36,6 дня. Период между началом цветения двух соседних соцветий составил в среднем 6,9 дня. Уборка плодов начиналась в среднем по всем соцветиям 25,2 дня после окончания цветения и заканчивалась череэ 25,1 дня. В пересчете на одно соцветие период между началом цветения и окончанием уборки составил в среднем 86,9 дня. Период между началом уборки плодов первого соцветия и окончанием уборки томатов десятого соцветия длился 73,7 дня. Длина растений до места заложения десятого соцветия составила в среднем 2,75 м. Среднее расстояние между двумя соседними соцветиями между первым и десятым соцветием составило 26,4 см. In three-year experiments with greenhouse tomato cv. Sonato which started flowering in mid-February, at the begin of March or in mid-March, the plants had to be cultured for 140.7 days on an average until completion of harvest of the tenth inflorescence. Total crop yield was up to 12 kg/m². Flowering extended over 85.7 days, with an average of 36.6 days per inflorescence. An average of 6.9 days elapsed between the begin of flowering in two neighbouring inflorescences. On an average of inflorescences, harvest began 25.2 days after the end of flowering and was finished after 25.1 days; hence, the time from the onset of flowering to the end of harvest was 86.9 days per inflorescence. Altogether 73.7 days passed between the begin of harvest of the first inflorescence and the end of harvest of the tenth one. Average plant height to the insertion of the tenth inflorescence was 2.75 m. The distance between two neighbouring inflorescences, in the range from first to tenth, was 26.4 cm on an average.

abstract_ts: Large nonsorted polygons in tundra areas underlain by discontinuous permafrost occur in Padjelanta National Park, northern Sweden (67°16′ N; 16°52′ E). Excavations in those of the polygons developed in silty till show only vague subsurface structures beneath polygon trenches, and crack fillings present are less than several millimeters thick. Such polygons may be contraction-crack polygons developed by seasonal frost cracking. Pits across trenches where polygons are developed in sandy outwash display obvious wedge-shaped casts predominantly more than several centimeters thick; these polygons are interpreted as tundra polygons originally developed in permafrost. The possibility of differential preservation is recognized; structures in silty till may have been more susceptible to destruction than forms in sandy outwash. Both types of polygons formed after the last major deglaciation, which ended approximately 8 000-9 500 B. P. They are now either fossil or largely inactive Frost cracking in the surface polygon trenches occurred between the summers of 1963 and 1967; possibly during the severe winter of 1965-1966 which was accompanied by thin snow cover. Outside the Puolejokk polygon sites in Padjelanta, similar surface features and subsurface casts have been reported from other localities in Swedish Lappland and northern Norway by other authors.

abstract_ts: We studied the mortality of amphibians and reptiles due to motor vehicles in a segment of 2.4Km along the Buga-Buenaventura road. This road crosses the Forestal Reserve Bosque de Yotoco, a fragment of Sub-Andean forest in the western Andes of Colombia. We also recorded the variation in composition and structure of herpetofaunal assemblages from areas close to the road versus areas away from the road (forest interior). We found a mortality rate of one vertebrate every 3-4 days; 50% were amphibians, mostly reptiles (snakes, 0.047 individual/day/Km). Amphibians appeared to be more susceptible than the reptiles to road disturbance. Amphibian richness was higher away from the road, in areas of forest interior (seven species) than in areas close to the road (four species), while reptiles exhibited an opposite pattern (twelve species close to the road versus eight species in the forest interior). Five species of amphibians and reptiles were recorded exclusively in areas near the road, five species exclusively in the forest interior, and eleven species in both areas. We discuss changes in distribution of species as a consequence of alteration in microclimatic characteristics and vegetal complexity in areas in proximity to the road, but other factors may have an influence as well (e.g., noise, pollution). Se estudió la mortalidad de anfibios y reptiles en un tramo de 2.4km de la vía Buga-Buenaventura que atraviesa la Reserva Forestal Bosque de Yotoco, un fragmento de bosque subandino en la cordillera Occidental de Colombia. Se analizaron variaciones en la estructura y la composición de los ensamblajes de anfibios y reptiles desde áreas de bosque cercanas a la carretera hacia áreas alejadas de ella (interior de bosque). Se encontró una tasa de mortalidad de un vertebrado cada 3-4 días, el 50% correspondió con anfibios y reptiles (serpientes, 0.047 individuos/día/Km). Los anfibios aparentemente son más sensibles que los reptiles a perturbaciones generadas por la carretera. Se registraron ocho especies de anfibios y trece de reptiles. La riqueza de anfibios fue mayor en áreas de interior de bosque (siete especies) que en áreas de borde de carretera (cuatro especies), mientras que los reptiles exhibieron un patrón contrario (doce especies en borde de carretera vs ocho en interior de bosque). Cinco especies de anfibios y reptiles se registraron exclusivamente en áreas adyacentes a la carretera; cinco especies se registraron exclusivamente en áreas de interior de bosque, mientras que once especies fueron compartidas en ambas áreas. Se discute la distribución de especies como resultado de posibles efectos directos e indirectos de la carretera en aspectos microclimáticos y de estructura vegetal, pero otros factores (ej. ruido, polución) son plausibles.

abstract_ts: Recently, Sousa et al. (2001) published a checklist of leguminous trees and shrubs in Mexico that are reported to reach a height of at least 3 m. Here, we provide an alphabetically ordered index that includes synonyms and names that are not recognized by us, but have been used during the last 20 years. Furthermore, we eliminate three and add 15 species, increasing the total number of species to 623. Recientemente, Sousa et al. (2001) publicaron un listado de las leguminosas arbóreas y arbustivas en México (≥ 3 m). En esta publicación se proporciona un índice alfabético que incluye sinónimos y nombres no reconocidos por nosotros, que se han empleado durante los últimos 20 años. Además, se eliminaron tres especies y se agregaron 15 más, de esta manera incrementando el número total de especies a 623.

abstract_ts: Die Wirkungsweise ökonomischer Wachstumsfaktoren im Reproduktionsprozeß der Zierpflanzenproduktion wurde mit Hilfe aggregierter Produktionsfunktionen dargestellt. Dabei wurden der Einfluß des Fondsvorschusses (Arbeitszeitfonds, Grundund Umlauffonds) und die Wirkungsweise des Fondsverzehrs (Kosten für lebendige und vergegenständlichte Arbeit) auf die Bildung von Bruttoprodukt und Nettoprodukt analysiert sowie Substitutionsbeziehungen zwischen Arbeitskräften und Grund-bzw. Umlauffonds ermittelt. Möglichkeiten und Grenzen der Faktorenkombination unter Praxisbedingungen werden anhand einer Produktionsfunktion für Planung und Analyse des wertmäßigen Bruttoprodukts dargestellt. Die Ergebnisse der untersuchten Substitutionsbeziehungen geben Hinweise über den notwendigen Freisetzungsaufwand für Arbeitskräfte und zur Wirkungsweise jener Produktionsfaktoren, die besonders die Intensivierung der gesellschaftlichen Produktion fördern. С помощью агрегированных производственных функций было показано действие экономических факторов роста в процессе воспроизводства в цветоводстве. В этой связи было проанализировано влияние фондового аванса/фонд рабочего времени, фонды основных и оборотных средств/и действие потребления фондов/стоимость живого и овеществленного труда/на производство валовой и чистой продукции, а также выявлены связи замещения между рабочей силой и основными оборотными фондами. На примере производственной функции для планирования и анализа валовой продукции в стоимостном выражении показываются возможности и пределы комбинирования факторов в условиях в практики. Результаты исследованных связей замещений показывают необходимые расходы на высвобожение рабочей силы и вскрывают действие тех производственных факторовм, которые особенно способствуют интенсификащии общественного производства. The mode of action of economic growth factors in the reproduction process of ornamental plant production is presented by means of aggregated production functions. This includes both an analysis of the effect of fund advance (working-hours fund, fixed and revolving funds) and of the mode of action of fund consumption (cost of living materialized labour) on the formation of gross product and net product, and the establishment of substitution relations between labour force and fixed or revolving funds, respectively. Possibilities and limits of factor combination under practice conditions are explained by means of a production function for planning and analysis of the ad valorem gross product. The results obtained from the analysis of the above substitution relations provide information on the required input for labour release and on the mode of action of those production factors that above all add to the intensification of social production.

abstract_ts: With the continuous development of computer software and hardware technology, three-dimensional graphics rendering technology has gradually become one of the main research contents of computer graphics. It plays a great role in virtual reality, digital city, film and television advertising, computer aided design and scientific computing visualization. The computer simulation of natural phenomena is the key technology in the rendering of three-dimensional graphics. Natural scenery has the characteristics of complex form, random change and so on. It is difficult to express and study with a definite mathematical model. Compared with natural phenomena such as fire, cloud, mountain and rain, underwater scenes are more challenging because of their complex motion rules and optical characteristics. Therefore, this study analyzedthe research status in China and abroad, improved and innovated the underwater scene rendering technology and large-scale underwater scene management technologybased on the research of underwater scene grid algorithm, which completedthe large-scale underwater real-time rendering and the optimization algorithm of underwater scene management for underwater scene geometry modeling. The simulation experiment is used to detect the rendering effect, the experimental structure proves that the method has strong practicability and can effectively improve the accuracy and authenticity of underwater scene reduction.

abstract_ts: The National Forest Management Act required that a comprehensive, long-range, resource-management plan be prepared for each national forest in the country. Accompanied by programmatic environmental impact statements, these plans are usually followed by site-specific project plans with additional environmental analysis. More than a decade of experience completing these plans has allowed the U.S. Forest Service to explore both the legal and technical requirements for assessing the cumulative environmental effects of its management activities. Many technical obstacles and scientific uncertainties remain, but the Forest Service's experience presents valuable lessons for other federal agencies with land management responsibilities that significantly affect the environment.

abstract_ts: The present study supports the view that the retinoblastoma functions are shared by two distinct retinoblastoma-related (RBR) protein subfamilies in the monocot cereal species, whereas dicot plants have only a single RBR protein. Genes encoding RBR proteins were identified and characterized in alfalfa (Medicago sativa), rice (Oryza sativa), and wheat (Triticum aestivum). The alfalfa MsRBR gene encodes a new member of the dicot RBR proteins (subfamily A). A comparison was made of two rice genes, OsRBR1 (subfamily B) and OsRBR2 (subfamily C), which exhibit differences in exon-intron organization and share only 52% amino acid sequence identity. The plant RBR proteins can be categorized into three distinct subfamilies, in which the similarity between members is greater than the similarity to other RBR proteins from the same species. Comparison of the transcript levels in various tissues revealed that the expression of the OsRBR1 gene was high in embryos or cultured cells and gradually decreased from the basal region to the tip of the leaves. The OsRBR2 gene displayed more transcripts in differentiated tissues, such as leaves and roots. In contrast, the mRNA level of the MsRBR gene did not differ significantly in either mature leaves or cultured cells. The results of yeast two-hybrid pairwise interaction assays demonstrated differences between the rice RBR variants in the interactions with the phosphatase 2A B'' regulatory subunit and an unknown protein. The in silico and functional data presented in this work highlight considerable differences between dicot and monocot species in the retinoblastoma regulatory pathways and permit an improved classification of RBR proteins in higher plants.

abstract_ts: Foi a segunda guerra mundial que criou as condições de unidade da oposição no Portugal de Salazar e também as duma resistência activa até certo ponto. As mesmas condições que facilitaram a implantação do Partido Comunista como uma força importante e a intensificação das greves e protestos populares também criaram uma disposição favorável à unidade na acção contra o regime em muitos sectores da oposição, antes dispersos. Neste texto é estudado esse momento da Oposição ao Estado Novo — o de 1942-47 — elegendo-se, dentro dele, como objecto privilegiado de análise o problema da estratégia oposicionista que surge circunscrito entre dois pólos: o da estratégia putschista, defendida pelos que viam nas Forças Armadas o elemento decisivo de ruptura do regime e o da insurreição popular, teorizada pelo PCP, assente no desenvolvimento das reivindicações económicas e sociais através da luta de massas. Entre estes dois pólos, as posições de ambiguidade e compromisso a que o estudo também dá relevo. Fazendo uma exposição clara de certas posições fundamentais em presença e retratando, de modo genérico, com base num correcto tratamento do discurso político explícito, os debates ocorridos, este artigo, apesar de se apresentar algo circunscrito nas fontes que utiliza, expõe, num panorama de carência geral de estudos sobre um tema tão importante, uma primeira formulação da polémica oposicionista do período da guerra. La deuxième guerre mondiale a créé les conditions d'unité de l'opposition dans le Portugal de Solazar et aussi celles pour une résistance active jusqu'à un certain degré. Les mêmes conditions qui on été favorables à l'implantation du Parti Communiste en tant qu'une force importante et l'intensification des grèves et protestations populaires ont aussi créé une disposition favorable à l'unité dans l'action contre le régime dans bien de secteurs de l'opposition, qui étaient dispers auparavant. Dans ce texte on analyse ce moment de l'Opposition à l'État Nouveau—la période de 1942 à 1947—en choisissant, lá-dedans, en tant qu'objet privilégié d'analyse, le problème de la stratégie d'opposition, qui est délimité par deux extrêmes: celui de la stratégie putschiste, soutenue par ceux qui voyaient dans les Forces Armées l'élément décisif de rupture à l'égard du régime et celui de Vinsurrection populaire, théorisée par le PCP, tout en s'appuyant sur le développement des revendications économiques et sociales par la lutte de musses. Entre ces deux extrêmes, il y a des positions d'ambiguïté et compromis, également soulignées par cette étude. Dans un panorama de carence générale d'études sur un sujet si important, cet article, même s'il reste un peu trop circonscrit par les sources dont il a disposé, offre une première élaboration de la polémique autour de l'oposition au Portugal pendant lu guerre. L'auteur expose nettement certaines positions fondamentaux en présence et esquisse le tableau général des débats concernant le sujet. The Second World War originated the conditions favourable to the unity of the Opposition to Solazar in Portugal and those for an active resistance in some extent. The same conditions that made possible the implantation of the Communist Party as an important force and the intensification of strikes and popular protest also created a climate suitable for the unity in action against the regime among a lot of opposition sectors, previously scattered. This text studies that moment of the Opposition to the New State in Portugal, in 1942-1947, specially focusing the problem of the opposition strategy circunscribed by two poles: that of the Putschist strategy — supported by those considering the Armed Forces as the decisive element to cause a rupture in the regime and that of the popular insurrection, theorized by the PCP, grounded in the development of the economic and social claims through the fighting masses. Between these two poles there are the positions of ambiguity and compromise, also emphasized. Within a panorama of general lack of studies on such an important subject this article, even if it is limited by the few sources available, offers a first glimpse of the polemic on the Opposition in Portugal during the war. The author clearly describes the main positions in presence and traces the development of the discussions on such an issue.

abstract_ts: Reintroduction programs are often initiated to restore the viability of endangered plant populations, whose decline is usually caused by loss of suitable habitats. Ligularia sibirica is a species associated with wetlands. It is endangered in Europe and has declined considerably in Estonia since the cessation of traditional management and, in addition, drainage leading to the overgrowth of habitats. The purpose of this work was to estimate the extent of the impact of competition from neighbouring plants and habitat change caused by overgrowing on the survival of transplants of L. sibirica and thereby assess the effectiveness of reinforcement. Laboratory-grown transplants were planted back into their original populations in plots arranged in a two × two (vegetation intact or removed × open or overgrown habitat) factorial experimental design, and their survival was followed for three years. The survival differed notably among populations, but the percentage of surviving plants per plot was on average higher in plots with intact vegetation and in open habitats. The latter indicates that overgrowing indeed decreases habitat quality for this species, despite the fact that plants of L. sibirica can often be found in forested habitats. The lower survival in plots where vegetation had been removed can largely be explained by increased damage caused by animals. In intact plots, by contrast, neighbouring plants provide shelter and protection. Our results stress the importance of restoration and preservation of habitat quality for the protection of this rare species, for which reinforcement may be effective.

abstract_ts: The association between mortality at the ages of 0-4 and 5-14 years in the county boroughs of England and Wales for 1971, using Kendall's correlation technique, and a variety of socioeconomic indicators, was computed. Kendall's partial correlation technique was used to determine whether any association remained when the effect of social class and unemployment was kept constant. At ages 0-4 years there was a significant and positive association between mortality and low socioeconomic position, high density housing, inadequate housing amenities, and the unemployment rate (P less than 0.001). A significant association with the housing variables remained when the effect of socioeconomic status and unemployment was kept constant. Between the ages 5-14 years there was a statistically significant association (P less than 0.001) between mortality and housing density which was eliminated when the effect of social class was held constant. There was no association between unemployment and mortality in this age group.

abstract_ts: Many important elements for the development of cultural/social anthropology had already been present before the Enlightenment, between the 15th and the beginning of the 18th century. The Italian traveller Pietro Delia Valle, who visited many Oriental countries and parts of India in the years 1614-1626, published the then most voluminous and sophisticated travel reports of the time. Besides other material, it contains a vast amount of ethnographic data. The argument of this article is that Delia Valle already developed and applied explicitly the main principles of ethnographic fieldwork, evaluated critically his data, and provided detailed information about his sources.

abstract_ts: La Suède est un pays de tradition démocratique, dont les paysans ne connurent point l'asservissement : le servage ni le féodalisme continental, et dont les organisations libres ont toujours joué un rôle important. Au Moyen-Age ce furent les paysans qui se réunirent lors des Tings, où se discutaient les affaires de la région, et se jugeaient même des litiges. Au moment de la differentiation économique et la naissance de divers intérêts et idéaux sociaux, les suédois formèrent des associations d'un nouveau genre: les intérêts économiques se « syndiquèrent » : d'abord les travailleurs salariés formèrent les syndicats ouvriers, ensuite le patronat s'organisa. Ces organisations furent suivies à leur tour par celles des artisans, des fonctionnaires et employés de bureau, et des professions libérales. Ces organisations ou associations représentent essentiellement des intérêts économiques. A côté de ces organisations virent également le jour des associations religieuses et culturales. L'importance de cette multiplicité d'organisations, ou d'institutionalisation d'intérêts, est que le citoyen ne confronte plus l'état seul, comme individu, mais comme membre d'une organisation qui peut être un groupe de pression (pressure group) efficace. L'état va même souvent déléguer certaines de ses fonctions à ces associations de citoyens. Il a souvent été dit que lorsque l'état se prépare à devenir totalitaire, il abat d'abord toutes les associations et institutions qui se trouvent entre lui et le citoyen individuel. La Suède est alors assurée de la survivance de la démocratie interne, et effective, tant que ses associations libres continuent à être viables et dynamiques. Sweden, a country of democratic traditions, has a people who have not known bondage; with neither serfdom nor continental feudalism, free organisations have always played an important role. In the Middle Ages, there were people meeting at Tings to discuss local affairs and even to judge law-suits. At the time of the economic change and the arising of various social interests and ideas, the Swedes formed associations of a new type : the economic interests were « syndicalised ». At first, the salaried workers formed « Workers Syndicates », and then the governing body organised itself. Thèse organisations wore followed in their turn by those of artisans, of office-workers, and of those in the liberal professions. These organisations or associations represented essentially economic interests. Besides these organisations, and on an equal footing, were the cultural and religious bodies. The importance of the multiplicity of groups, or, to vary the phrase, the drawing together of interests, is that the citizen no longer confronts the State alone, as an individual, but as a member of an organisation which can be an effective « pressure group ». The State often will even delegate certain of its functions to these groups. It has often been said that when a State is preparing to become totalitarian, it breaks down, first of all, all the groups and institutions which come between it and the individual citizen Sweden is thus assured of the survival of effective internal democracy as long as these free associations continue to be active and viable. Schweden ist ein Land mit demokratischer Tradition. Seine Bauern haben nie die Knechtschaft kennengelernt, weder die Leibeigenschaft noch den kontinentalen Feudalismus. Die freien Organisationen haben immer eine wichtige Rolle gespielt. Im Mittelalter versammelten sich die Bauern anlässlich der Things, wo die Angelegenheiten des Landes besprochen wurden und sogar in Streitfallen Recht gesprochen wurde. Zur Zeit der wirtschaftlichen Differenzierung, als verschieden gerichtete gesellschaftliche Interessen und Ideale entstanden, bildeten die Schweden Vereinigungen neuer Art ; die wirtschaftlichen Interessen organisierten sich in Genossenschaften. Zuerst riefen die Lohnarbeiter die Gewerkschaften ins Leben, dann organisierte sich die Arbeitgeberschaft. Diesen Organisationen folgten ihrerseits die der Handwerker, der Beamten und Angestellten und der freien Berufe. Diese Organisationen und Verbände vertreten wesentlich wirtschaftliche Interessen. Neben diesen Organisationen entstanden ebenso religiöse und kulturelle Vereinigungen. Die Bedeutung dieser Vielzahl von Organisationen, oder der Interessenvertretung durch Institutionen, liegt darin, dass der Bürger dem Staat nicht mehr allein, als Individuum, gegenübertritt, sondern als Mitglied einer Organisation, die eine wirksame Gruppe zur Ausübung eines Druckes (pressure group) sein kann. Der Staat überträgt sogar oft diesen Vereinigungen von Bürgern manche seiner Funktionen. Es ist oft gesagt worden, dass der Staat, wenn er sich anschickt totalitär zu werden, zuerst alle Verbände und Einrichtungen zerschlägt, die sich zwischen ihn und den einzelnen Bürger stellen. Schweden kann solange einer wirksamen inneren Demokratie sicher sein, als seine freien Vereinigungen lebensfähig und kraftvoll bleiben.

abstract_ts: Random minimal trees in both 2 and 3 dimensions are discussed. The expected total length of the minimal trees connecting n points uniformly distributed in an area A, and in a volume V, are asymptotic to α2(An)1/2, α3(Vn)1/3respectively, where α2and α3are constants. Upper and lower bounds are obtained on these constants and their values estimated by a Monte Carlo technique.

abstract_ts: Selon le Prof. Grisoli l'Italie compte avec ses 400 revues juridiques plus de revues de cette catégorie que n'importe quel autre pays et plus que n'en sont publiées dans le monde anglo-saxon tout entier. Parmi ces 400 revues il y en auraient pourtant qui ne seraient guère connues même en Italie. C'est pourquoi il parle d'une prolifération, et il n'en excepte que l'histoire du droit, le droit ecclésiastique et le droit comparé. Le but de la présente enquête serait l'investigation des « facteurs constants dans l'évolution de la littérature périodique du droit ». L'auteur aurait choisi l'emploi de questionnaires comme méthode, afin d'éviter un jugement trop subjectif. L'enquête a été adressée à un certain nombre de personnalités, dont quelques unes n'ont pas répondu. Il s'agit de professeurs de faculté, de magistrats et de directeurs de maisons d'édition. — Le texte suivant tâchera de résumer les réponses reçues des collaborateurs de l'enquête. En ce qui concerne l'existence d'un nombre de revues juridiques si élevé, ont été cité les causes suivantes: 1. La structure systématique du droit italien et le fait qu'il se prête facilement à la théorie; 2. le grand nombre de juristes, en particulier des avocats et des étudiants en droit, ainsi que des lecteurs dans les pays de langue espagnole et portugaise; 3. le caractère individualiste de la vie académique en Italie, les revues servant de moyen d'expression à certaines personnalités; 4. les frais d'impression relativement bas, ainsi que les subventions de la part des intéressées dans certains cas. — La plupart des interlocuteurs ne sont pas satisfaits de l'abondance des revues. Comme argument positif on a mentionné la possibilité ainsi créée d'exprimer des points de vue opposés. La majorité, par contre, a parlé de gaspillage ; certaines voix ne seraient dans l'impossibilité de se faire entendre, car leur rayonnement était trop limité dans de petites revues; certaines revues auraient un niveau trop bas; certaines personnalités seraient trop mises en évidence. Les réponses sur la question de savoir si les revues juridiques italiennes agissent de stimulant positif pour le législateur sont partagées. On prétend que certaines revues ne présenteraient que des orientations et des anālyses de lege lata, mals point de propositions. La critique de la jurisprudence serait souvent trop sévère. Certains commentaires ne serviraient qu'aux intérêts de certains milieux. D'autres attirent, par contre, l'attention sur le fait que depuis 1945 la science juridique aurait exercé à plusieurs reprises une influence sur le législateur par exemple, en matière de droit constitutionnel, dans le droit des sociétés anonymes, sur l'abolition de la peine capitale etc. Il n'a pas été contesté que les revues juridiques publiant des décisions et des notes les accompagnant, exercent une influence considérable sur la pratique italienne. On a fait état des causes suivantes: L'absence de recueils de décisions officielles, même pour les Cours suprêmes (Corte di cassazione, Corte costituzionale); la faculté de se référer à la doctrine dans des notes, ce qui est parfois même pratiqué par les juges dans les cas qu'ils décident. De telles références sont interdites dans les jugements par le Code de procédure civile italien. D'autre part l'effet de ces causes serait réduit en raison de la surcharge de labeur des magistrats et de l'insuffisance de beaucoup de bibliothèques juridiques. Souvent, néanmoins des juges s'abonneraient, à titre privé du moins, à une revue spécialisée du secteur qui les préoccupe particulièrement. Parfois le nombre des revues auxquelles s'abonnent les avocats excéderait celui des abonnements dans les bibliothèques des tribunaux. La première question posée par le rapporteur quant aux bases financières des revues juridiques italiennes concerne leur tirage. La revue la plus répandue, la « Giurisprudenza italiana » qui a beaucoup d'importance à cause de sa partie jurisprudentielle, aurait untirage de 15.000 exemplaires; une revue analogue en aurait un de 14.000 exemplaires. D'autres revues juridiques générales qui contiennent des décisions et qui ainsi trouvent la faveur spéciale des practiciens atteindraient jusqu'à 7000 exemplaires. Des revues purement théoriques auraient des tirages de 1000 exemplaires environ, les tirages les plus faibles étant réservés aux périodiques des institutions académiques qui les utiliseraient principalement pour les envoyer en échange. Les revues juridiques plus petites ne sauraient couvrir leurs frais. Elles seraient en partie subventionnées par des corporations locales et des groupes influents. L'éditeur d'un journal pourrait aussi regarder ses revues comme moyen de publicité ; par contre, il n'exercerait aucune influence directe sur le contenu des articles. Beaucoup des voix se sont prononcées en faveur d'une restriction du nombre des revues juridiques; on a parlé d'un optimum de 40 revues, y comprises les revues spécialisées. En revanche, un des éditeurs estimerait qu'il existe une baisse automatique du nombre des revues au cours des temps. Tandis que l'influence des revues juridiques italiennes sur la pratique serait démontrable, les revues juridiques étrangères n'auraient pas de poids, sauf d'une manière indirecte et dans certaines branches du droit. Néanmoins les revues italiennes, selon les personnes interrogées, communiqueraient plus d'informations sur l'opinion étrangère que l'étranger ne citerait l'Italie, abstraction faite de l'Amérique latine. Pour l'Italie la littérature juridique des pays suivants et dans l'ordre suivant serait la plus importante : Allemagne, France, pays anglo-saxons. Une minorité considère le droit français et une autre le common law, comme étant les systèmes juridiques les plus importants. Peu de revues italiennes (de droit comparé, de droit international public, de droit romain) auraient un nombre d'abonnés substantiel à l'étranger. Pour cette raison, et aussi pour des raisons de coût généralement, les revues italiennes n'auraient pas de résumé en langue étrangère. Mais beaucoup de revues italiennes accepteraient des contributions de juristes étrangers, et on propose aussi une coopération internationale plus forte. La majorité a rejeté l'impression d'articles étrangers traduits dans les revues italiennes comme non souhaitable et superflue. Mit ca. 400 juristischen Zeitschriften weise Italien mehr juristische Zeitschriften auf als jedes andere Land und auch mehr als in der gesamten anglo-amerikanischen Welt herauskämen. Von diesen 400 Zeitschriften seien allerdings viele auch in Italien selbst kaum bekannt. Professor Grisoli spricht daher von einer « Wucherung » (proliferation) und nimmt davon nur Rechtsgeschichte, (Staats) Kirchenrecht (ecclesiastical law) und Rechtsvergleichung aus. Ziel der Untersuchung sei die Erforschung der « konstanten Faktoren bei der Entwicklung des juristischen periodischen Schrifttums » gewesen. Um einer zu subjektiven Beurteilung zu entgehen, habe der Berichterstatter die Fragebogen-Methode gewählt. Die Adressaten der Umfrage, von denen einige nicht antworteten, waren Universitätsdozenten, darunter international berühmte Persönlichkeiten, daneben Richter und Verleger. Im folgenden werden die Antworten der Mitarbeiter der Umfrage zusammenfassend wiedergegeben. Als Ursache für die Existenz einer Vielzahl juristischer Zeitschriften wurden angegeben: 1. Der systematische Aufbau des italienischen Recht und die Neigung zur théorie; 2. die grosse duzahl von Juristen, insbesondere von Rechtsanvôlten und Rechtsgelchrten, sowie von Lesern in spanisch und portugiesisch sprachigen Landern; 3. der individualistische Charakter des akademischen Lebens in Italien: Zeitschriften als Sprachrohr enzelner Persönlichkeiten; 4. die relativ niedrigen Druckkosten, dazu in einigen Fallen Subventionierung durch Interessenten. — Die Mehrzahl der Einsender faud die Vielzahl der Zeitschriften nicht erfreulich. Als positiv wurde erwähnt, daß man so eine Möglichkeit habe, entgegengesetzte Standpunkte auszudrüeckn. Die Mehr, heit kritisierte hingegen Verschwendung; einige Stimmen würden überhört, da sie sich in zu kleinen Zeitschriften äußerten; einige hätten ein zu niedriges Niveau (Wiederholungen); einzelne Persönlichkeiten würden zu sehr herausgestellt. Die Frage, ob die italienischen juristischen Zeitschriften durch ihre Artikel den Gesetzgeber im positiven Sinne anregten, wurde unterschiedlich beantwortet. Es wurde behauptet, einige Zeitschriften brächten nur Übersichten und Analysen de lege lata, aber keine Vorschläge. Die Kritik der Rechtsprechung sei oft unnötig hart. Manche Stellungnahmen dienten nur der Einflußnahme bestimmter Kreise. Andere wiesen jedoch darauf hin, daß die Rechtswissenschaft nach 1945 den Gesetzgeber mehrfach habe eindeutig positiv beeinflussen können, so auf dem Gebiete des Verfassungsrechts, des Aktienrechts, hinsichtlich der Abschaffung der Todesstrafe usw. Unbestritten blieb, daß juristische Zeitschriften, die Urteile veröffentlichen und Anmerkungen hierzu, auf die italienische Praxis einen beachtlichen Einfluß ausüben. Als besondere Gründe hierfür wurden genannt: Fehlen amtlicher Entscheidungssammlungen, selbst der höchsten Gerichte (Corte di cassazione, Corte costituzionale) ; die Möglichkeit, in den Anmerkungen — was gelegentlich auch Richter in eigener Sache tun — auf die Literatur (dottrina) Bezug zu nehmen. Das ist im Urteil selbst nach der italienischen Zivilprozeßordnung verboten. Die Wirkung sei andererseits begrenzt wegen des Zeitmangels der Praktiker und der mangelnden Größe vieler Fachbibliotheken. Immerhin hielten Richter oft privat wenigstens eine Zeitschrift des Gebietes, auf dem sie beruflich besonders aktiv sind. Rechtsanwälte bezögen oft mehr Zeitschriften als die staatlich unterhaltenen Büchereien der Gerichte. Hinsichtlich der finanziellen Basis der italienischen juristischen Zeitschriften fragte der Berichterstatter zunächst nach der Auflagenhöhe. Die verbreitetste Zeitschrift, wichtig wegen ihres Rechtsprechungsteiles, die « Giurisprudenza italiana », habe eine Aublage von 15.000 Exemplaren, eine analoge Zeitschrift eine solche von mehr als 14.000 Stück. Andere Zeitschriften allgemein-juristischen Inhalts, die Urteile abdrucken und damit den Praktiker stark ansprächen, erreichten bis zu 7000 Exemplaren, Rein gelehrte Zeitschriften hätten Auflagen um 1000 Exemplare, am wenigsten die Zeitschriften der akademischen Institutionen, die vorwiegend Tauschzwecken dienten. Die kleineren juristischen Zeitschriften konnten nicht kostendeckend arbeiten. Sie erhielten teilweise Subventionen von lokalen Verbänden und Interessengruppen. Der Verleger könne auch Zeitschriften als Werbemedien seines Verlages betrachten; er nehme jedoch kaum unmittelbaren Einfluß auf den Inhalt der Aufsätze. Zahlreiche Stimmen traten für eine Beschränkung der Anzahl der juristischen Zeitschriften ein; man sprach von einem Optimum von 40 Zeitschriften einschließlich der spezialisierten. Dagegen glaubte ein Verleger an eine automatische Reduzierung der Zeitschriftenzahl. Während der Einfluß der italienischen juristischen Zeitschriften auf die Praxis nachweisbar ist, sei die Wirkung ausländischer Fach-Zeitschriften nur auf einigen Gebieten und nur indirekt spürbar. Italienische Zeitschriften berichten nach den Einsendern trotzdem mehr über die Meinungen des Auslandes als das Ausland Italien zitiere, abgesehen von Lateinamerika. Am wichtigsten für Italien sei die juristische Literatur Deutschlands, Frankreichs und des angloamerikanischen Bereichs, und zwar in dieser Reihenfolge. Eine Minderheit hield das Recht Frankreichs bzw. das Common Law für am wichtigsten. Nur wenige italienische Zeitschriften (Rechtsvergleichung, Völkerrecht, römisches Recht) hätten eine größere Anzahl ausländischer Bezieher. Deswegen und aus Kalkulationsgründen wiesen die italienischen Zeitschriften auch keine Zusammenfassungen in anderen Sprachen auf. Viele italienische Zeitschriften ständen ausländischen Gelehrten für ihre Beiträge offen. Stärkere internationale Zusammenarbeit wurde vorgeschlagen. Einen Abdruck ausländischer Artikel in Übersetzung in den italienischen Zeitschriften wurde von der Mehrheit als nicht erwünscht und nicht erforderlich abgelehnt.

abstract_ts: While the study of Kabbalah is expanding in non-Orthodox circles both around the world and in Israel, Kabbalah is also studied in Orthodox (mainly Sephardic) yeshivot concerned with tikkun (divine repair) of the world and of the individual. Tikkun of the world involves a special kabbalistic prayer method, while tikkun of the individual involves methods of healing and treatment of personal problems. This article, based on participant observation conducted for a year in a Jerusalem kabbalistic yeshiva, is a response to the appeal for an ethnographic study of those immersed in Kabbalah in the traditional locale. The fieldwork findings reveal that the yeshiva, the traditional institution of study, also serves as a place of healing and personal therapy in which the sacred text occupies a central place. In the yeshiva, instrumental use is made of the text as object. From a configuration of symbols subject to many alternate interpretations, the text is transformed into a pattern of icons and signals with only one meaning. The kabbalists as therapists use texts to create personalized symbols that assist their supplicants in coping with their personal hardships. This ability is a powerful cultural tool that provides support and solace to the community of believers, and is simultaneously a powerful instrument in the hands of the yeshiva institution. We conclude that a community whose members adopt a mystical worldview, also gradually attribute iconic significance to its texts.
